summary: Full backend + frontend test of the new Zerax Delivery system (3-sided: merchant ACP, driver PWA, customer track). All 16 backend pytest tests pass against the public URL; ACP delivery tab and driver_app.html both work end-to-end including OTP login, status toggle, tab switching, session persistence (localStorage zrx_drv_token), logout, order assignment modal, add-driver flow (toast '✓ تم حفظ السائق' verified + API confirmation), and stats auto-refresh.

issues: Sub-tab BUTTONS use IDs #dlv-sub-orders/#dlv-sub-drivers/#dlv-sub-zones — these are the buttons themselves, not the panes. The problem statement listed these as pane selectors which can confuse next testers. Consider renaming to #dlv-tabbtn-* and #dlv-pane-* for clarity.

critical_code_review_comments: delivery_router.py uses in-memory dicts (intentional per agent-to-agent note). Will reset on backend restart — fine for demo, but seed is only at module import so any test run that restarts backend will need to re-seed.
OTP code is hard-coded '1234' and returned in the login response (demo_code field). Acceptable for demo; flag if this ever moves to production.
auto_assign in create_order picks drivers with status 'online' only (not 'delivering') — by design (load balancing). All 5 seed drivers have varied statuses so behaviour is verifiable.
delete_driver correctly unassigns active orders and reverts them to 'pending' (verified).
test_credentials: Driver phone 0552222222 (خالد العتيبي, ⭐4.9), OTP 1234. Other phones: 0501111111 / 0533333333 / 0544444444 / 0555555555. No auth required for ACP (mockup using localStorage).
seed_data_creation: Delivery module auto-seeds 5 drivers + 5 orders on import. Tests also created/deleted a transient TEST_ driver to verify upsert + unassign-on-delete behaviour, then cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /api/delivery/* endpoints verified via /app/backend/tests/test_delivery.py (16/16 pass). Driver app at /mockups/driver_app.html verified end-to-end (login OTP 0552222222→1234, status toggle, tab switch, session persistence after reload, logout). ACP delivery tab verified: 4-stat strip renders (e.g. 3/5/3/287), driver-app link with 'فتح ↗', 3 sub-tabs (الطلبات/السائقون/المناطق) all switch via dlvSwitchSub(), assign-driver modal opens and assigns drivers (toast '✓ تم إسناد الطلب'), add-driver form creates driver and shows 'تم حفظ السائق' toast, drivers list pulls correctly. No JS console errors. Storage is in-memory: any backend restart loses TEST_ data and resets seed.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Initial Playwright failures were due to selector confusion (sub-tab IDs are on the buttons themselves, NOT the panes) — fixed by calling dlvSwitchSub() directly via page.evaluate(). Add-driver save button label was '💾 حفظ السائق' which wasn't in my initial match list.
